name: io.github.qtcl-network.qtcl-blockchain
title: QTCL — Quantum Token Chain Ledger
description: Post-quantum blockchain with flat-fee agent transactions, native MCP tools for balance, send, quantum metrics, and oracle consensus. Implements MCP 2025-06-18 streamable HTTP transport.

transports.description: Local stdio transport for Claude Desktop, Cursor, and CLI agents

authentication.description: Open public MCP endpoint. Read tools need no auth. qtcl_send_transaction requires on-chain HypΓ Schnorr-Γ signatures; private keys never leave the client.

transaction_workflow.description: Exact steps to send QTCL — all fields must be consistent between signing and submission

steps.critical: Must be > 1700000000000. Sequential ints cause nonce_replay rejection. Mempool rejects nonce <= confirmed.

steps.purpose: Canonical signing payload — sort_keys=True is mandatory
HypΓ Schnorr-Γ sign; may time out once on cold start — retry once

steps.critical: signature MUST be sign_result['signature_for_tx'] verbatim — full JSON-encoded canonical dict. Do NOT pass sub-fields. nonce MUST match step 2.

common_errors.nonce_replay: nonce <= confirmed. Fix: use int(time.time()*1000), never sequential ints.
common_errors.HypΓ_verification_failed_invalid_v2: Wrong sig format. Fix: pass signature_for_tx string, not R-matrix sub-dict.
common_errors.sign_timeout: qtcl_hyp_signMessage timed out (5s). Fix: retry once — engine was cold-starting.
